issue.title: WPHX-310 — Themes, theme JSON, template hierarchy

artifacts.role: theme/template source, distribution, ABI, and upstream test surface inventory

fixtures_cover: theme support and classic template hierarchy observations

remaining_gaps: Generated public PHP replacement for theme.php, class-wp-theme.php, class-wp-theme-json.php, class-wp-theme-json-resolver.php, template.php, block-template.php, customize, nav-menu, and widget files is not claimed.
Full database-backed installed theme, Customizer, widget, nav-menu, user global-styles CPT, and browser Customizer behavior remains later distribution work.
Full upstream theme suite parity and ecosystem plugin/theme corpus coverage are not claimed.
This closes the WPHX-310 source-domain evidence slice, not the whole WordPress theme subsystem.
